title: Principal Plant Manager at Samsung India Electronics Capital India

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Samsung India Electronics Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics Capital India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics Capital India:
Samsung India Electronics Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics Capital India!
